creator: ads@solutionpoint.in
text:
Thanks for suggestions. It really means we are migrating to FreeBSD and 
public offers are in planning stage as we are new to this OS with only 
50+ websites currently hosted, but it is evolving... Changes made see, 
www.solutionpoint.in/node/565

On 05/01/2013 13:08, Johann Kois wrote:
> Thank you for providing feedback.  What exactly does "We provide VPS and
> custom hosting services to selected clients" mean?  Does this mean that
> not everyone will be able to order these services?  Or is more like "if
> a customer asks for it we can provide it"?
>
> 2 notes:
> - It is a little bit difficult to find the information about your
> FreeBSD usage on your website.
> - Would be nice to have the FreeBSD logo there instead of the Linux logo
> (after all these are 2 different operating systems).  See
> http://www.FreeBSD.org/favicon.ico or http://www.FreeBSD.org/logo.html
> for examples.
>
